what: The RSI loop's keep/revert KPI (internal/rsiloop LRU hit-rate over a fixed reference trace) reproduces BIT-FOR-BIT across architecture, OS, Go toolchain, and fak version. This is the empirical backing for docs/rsi-loop.md's claim that 'the keep/revert decision is the same on a Mac and a Windows box, so a KEEP can't be a one-box fluke' and for tools/rsi_maturity_scorecard.py's deterministic_metric criterion.

closed_loop_witness_workstation-a.note: cmd/rsiloop -mode improve -candidates 6,8,8,10, baseline re-derived off latest main; every suite/truth/cand field DERIVED from a real detached-worktree measurement, not hand-fed

cycles.why: no strict gain — reverted despite green suite + clean tree
